message:
chore: bump and publish npm packages

Published to npm:
- @ruvector/ruvf 0.1.2
- @ruvector/rvf-wasm 0.1.1
- @ruvector/rvf-node 0.1.1
- @ruvector/rvf-mcp-server 0.1.1
- ruvector 0.1.98
- rvlite 0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@

   "name": "ruvector",
-  "version": "0.1.97",
+  "version": "0.1.98",

   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "types": "dist/index.d.ts",

   },
